caption: A person's hand is shown opening a black "OBSIDIAN" trading card box set on a red surface featuring a large orange "JASPYS" logo. The hand reaches into the box to pull out a small, clear plastic pack containing a trading card. A logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" is overlaid on the scene. In a small inset window, a man with a beard wearing a dark jacket is visible, sitting in a room with computer equipment and shelving. As the sequence progresses, the hand grasps a card pack and lifts it upward, partially removing it from the box. The text "2 AUTOGRAPPHS!" is printed on the side of the black box. The background remains static while the action of removing the card pack from the "OBSIDIAN" box unfolds.
